reviews.review_description:
I appreciate the 1 week trial to determine if this is a fit or not. After wanting more out of PickleBall One, I was pointing here to PickleDrill360. 
For the price, I can't seem to justify the features. Clearly the developers are working hard to provide a polished app, so that's not the issue. The drills are well suited for play and the space options seem to hold a room well. The physics are realistic as well. 🔥

I do not like that you cannot use your own adapter. There is not an adjustment on the grip location so you have to use their adapter if you want to use one. 

However the biggest reason I won't keep the app is the cost. For nearly the cost of a local membership I'd rather play with people than just VR. I know not everyone has affordable club options near them, so this may just be a local quirk for my situation. 

If there was a 1 time purchase of $100-200 rather than a $300-400 annual membership I'd be happy to recommend the app. Now, if there was a way to use insurance.....😅🫣

There seems to be a pretty big gap between Pickleball One and Pickledrill360. Somewhere in the middle will be a great app for more-than-casual but less-than-pro players.

Tl;Dr: the app seems to be well thought out and programmed, but the cost currently is too high for me to justify.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing Pickleball One and for the thoughtful review of PickleDrill360.

We think PickleDrill360 is not really comparable to general club or open play. It is a dedicated drilling and training solution. In the real world, this type of focused training would require a dedicated drilling partner, a high-end ball machine, court time, travel, and constant drill innovation.

PickleDrill360 gives players unlimited structured drilling at home, anytime. Unlike a traditional ball machine or training partner, PD360 is available 24x7 and tracks every shot, including accuracy, speed, and spin. In a few months, your level will improve.

Subscriptions allow us to continuously innovate, add new drills and features, support new hardware, and keep improving the platform over time. Upcoming releases include support for the SolidSlime adapter and a Custom Drill Creator that allows players to design, save, and share their own drills with the community.

We also offer a pause option anytime for players that are traveling or planning to drill less for a couple of months.

Also, as a Pickleball One user, you qualify for a discount. Just email hello@pickledrill360.com and we’ll get you setup.

reviews.review_description: I pretty much hit up every training session in all the modes. They're super helpful for real-world stuff, but I did notice one thing that could be better: I can't use my own grip adapter.(solidslime)😭😭😭

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great feedback! SolidSlime support expected in the next two weeks! Feel free to reach out any time on our Facebook Player Community page (https://www.facebook.com/groups/pickledrill360) or via hello@pickledrill360.com

reviews.review_description: Loved the drills and the way they were featured on specific skill practice..😄
The drills look great and make the training feel very close to real pickleball gameplay.
This app helps me improve my real-life pickleball skills.
